text.tspan: BREAKING NEWS
@unhappychoice builds entire npm package from scratch in 7 days. Experts stunned.
UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice commits 476 times this week. Keyboard reportedly smoking.
JUST IN
@unhappychoice integrates 3 AI providers in single PR. OpenAI, Anthropic, Google all conquered.
RED ALERT
@unhappychoice deploys to npm with full CI/CD pipeline. No survivors in dependency hell.
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice adds SEO with OG images and JSON-LD. Google crawlers reportedly excited.
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice solves timezone calculation bug affecting developers worldwide.
NOT A DRILL
@unhappychoice ships i18n support for 10 languages. Babel fish obsolete.
